message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
abstract class Pizza {
    + void prepare()
    + void bake()
    + void cut()
    + void box()
}

class LDPepperPizza
class LDCheesePizza
class BJPepperPizza
class BJCheesePizza

Pizza <|-- LDPepperPizza
Pizza <|-- LDCheesePizza
Pizza <|-- BJPepperPizza
Pizza <|-- BJCheesePizza

interface AbsFactory {
    + Pizza createPizza()
}

class LDFactory
class BJFactory

AbsFactory <|.. LDFactory
AbsFactory <|.. BJFactory

LDFactory ..> LDPepperPizza : creates
LDFactory ..> LDCheesePizza : creates
BJFactory ..> BJPepperPizza : creates
BJFactory ..> BJCheesePizza : creates

class OrderPizza
OrderPizza o-- AbsFactory

skinparam packageStyle rectangle
@enduml
```
